Services: Milla/Oil Seed and Skin Tag Removal (Light / 1-15 spots)
Description:
Many of us experience the development of milia (commonly known as oil seeds), sebaceous hyperplasia or pesky skin tags that can affect the smoothness and appearance of our skin. 

These benign growths, while harmless, can sometimes become a cosmetic concern.

Our specialized Milla/Oil Seed and Skin Tag Removal service uses the Electrocautery method and is designed to safely and effectively treat these imperfections, resulting in a more refined look. 

Numbing is required. Healing may take up to 2-5 days, depending on the extent of the treatment. 

It is also likely that you will experience some redness, swelling, sensitivity, peeling and/or scabbing after the treatment. Aftercare advice must be strictly adhered to for best results. 

After-care ointment will be provided.
Includes:
Double cleanse
Numbing cream
Electrocautery removal
Aftercare ointment

Our heads carry more than just thoughts — they hold tension, stress, and the weight of our daily lives.

Services: Please refer to website for pricing: https://www.theeverydayskin.com.sg/pages/everyday-laser-hair-removal
Description:
This treatment uses advanced diode light to emits a specific wavelength of light that is absorbed by the pigment (melanin) in the hair. This light is converted to heat, which damages the hair follicle and inhibits future hair growth.

The process targets hair during active growth phase, so multiple sessions are typically required for optimal results.

We asians have darker, coarser hair with light to tan skin tones - light-based treatments like diode (what we use!) is especially effective and safe for our skin types.

Please note:

Everyday hair removal may not be the best option for clients with very light-coloured hair as there is not much pigment within the follicles for the light to absorb.

On the other hand, there might also be possible complications for clients with darker skin tones due to the presence of high concentration of pigment in the skin. But not to worry, we would always work with our clients to ensure the most efficient results and comfort level. 

Certain medications, such as muscle relaxants, anti-depressants, anti-cancer drugs, acne medications, and topical creams containing Retin-A, may cause your body to become more sensitive to light. In such cases, it is recommended to re-schedule the appointment to a time when you are no longer taking such medication.

Please do not hesitite to reach out to us (WA +65 8954 9277) for any queries you might have!
Includes: Can input table pricing and FAQ?

Description:
A premium lash lift using Elleebana products to enhance natural lashes with lift, curl and definition.

A lash lift works with your natural lashes to create a luscious semi-permanent curl that will last between 6-8 weeks, depending on your lash growth. We recommend lash lifts as a great alternative to eyelash extensions!

Our Lash Lifts and Brow Lamination uses Elleebana Profusion system from Australia – Utilises a cysteamine HCL active and contains no thioglycolate which allows for a gentle and effective lash lift/lamination. 
Profusion minimises the chance of over processing, keeps lashes healthy and maintains the bond integrity of the lash.

This system, being more gentle, means you can generally re-book at the 4-6 week cycle phase. It works extremely well on clients who have very thin and brittle lashes. Perfect for us, Asian girlies!

In addition to Ellebana Profusion system, we may also use Korean/Japanese produdcts in your treatment depending on your lash/brow health.
Includes:
Lash Bubble Cleanse
Softening of lashes
Setting of lashes
Lash Nourishment
Lash Tint
Finishing Lash Serum
